task_completion.visual_evidence: The main NinjaTrader 8 Control Center window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The Instrument Lists window is open
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Instrument Lists' dialog box or window is open within the NinjaTrader 8 interface (typically accessed via Tools -> Instrument Lists).

task_completion.description: A new list named 'Sector_Rotation' is created
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'Sector_Rotation' is visible in the list of available Instrument Lists in the left pane of the Instrument Lists window.

task_completion.description: SPY is added to the Sector_Rotation list
task_completion.visual_evidence: With 'Sector_Rotation' selected, the symbol 'SPY' is visible in the instruments/contents pane on the right side of the window.

task_completion.description: AAPL is added to the Sector_Rotation list
task_completion.visual_evidence: With 'Sector_Rotation' selected, the symbol 'AAPL' is visible in the instruments/contents pane on the right side of the window.

task_completion.description: MSFT is added to the Sector_Rotation list
task_completion.visual_evidence: With 'Sector_Rotation' selected, the symbol 'MSFT' is visible in the instruments/contents pane on the right side of the window.

integrity.description: Agent used the NinjaTrader 8 GUI to create the list
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through the NinjaTrader 8 menus (e.g., Tools -> Instrument Lists) and using the application's native dialog boxes, rather than using a terminal to modify SQLite databases directly.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual NinjaTrader 8 application
integrity.visual_evidence: The instrument list and symbols must be visible inside the genuine NinjaTrader 8 'Instrument Lists' window, not typed into Notepad, a text editor, or a mock UI.
The agent did not simply open a text file or terminal and print 'Task completed: Sector_Rotation created with SPY, AAPL, MSFT' without actually performing the steps in NinjaTrader.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected instrument list name is 'Sector_Rotation'. The expected instruments to be added to this list are 'SPY', 'AAPL', and 'MSFT'. These are valid stock symbols natively supported by NinjaTrader 8. Instrument lists are managed within NinjaTrader's GUI and stored in its internal SQLite database (not as standalone text files in the templates folder), so verification must rely on seeing the 'Sector_Rotation' list and its contents populated inside the NinjaTrader 8 'Instrument Lists' GUI window.
